parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.repoName, private: false, auto_init: true, description: $json.businessName + ' - Built by The Forge' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add Claude Code GitHub Action workflow', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeYmlB64 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Add CLAUDE.md with full PRD-derived design system and spec', content: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.claudeMdB64 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.issueTitle, body: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.issueBody, labels: ['product-agent'] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_name: $json.agentName, voice_id: $json.voiceId, response_engine: { type: 'retell-llm', llm_id: null }, agent_prompt: $json.scriptContent, language: 'en-US', voice_temperature: 0.7, responsiveness: 0.8, interruption_sensitivity: 0.6, enable_backchannel: true, boosted_keywords: $json.boostedKeywords }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ launched_at: new Date().toISOString(), repo_url: 'https://github.com/ShalinPatel670/' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, repo_name: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, status: 'deploying', retell_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellAgentId || null, retell_voice: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.voiceName || null, retell_phone_number: $json.retellPhoneNumber || null, site_url: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.siteUrl || null, cal_booking_url: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.bookingLink || 'https://cal.com/shalinp' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ area_code: 415, inbound_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || null, outbound_agent_id: $json.retellAgentId || null }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'success', message: 'Birth Protocol complete for ' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessName, businessId: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.businessId, repoUrl: 'https://github.com/ShalinPatel670/' + $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.repoName, issueUrl: $('Step 4 - Create Build Issue').first().json.html_url || 'created', hasPrd: $('Prepare Payloads').first().json.hasPrd, retellAgentCreated: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellCreated || false, retellAgentId: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellAgentId || null, retellError: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellError || null, steps: { repoCreated: true, claudeActionAdded: true, claudeMdAdded: true, buildIssueCreated: true, retellAgentCreated: $('Step 4.5c - Parse Retell Response').first().json.retellCreated || false, knowledgeGraphUpdated: true } }) }}
